highlights: Architected a Generative AI-powered test generation framework using prompt engineering — reduced manual test authoring by 45% and expanded edge-case coverage across microservices.
Built LLM-based tooling to automatically analyse CI/CD failure logs, categorise root causes, and surface remediation suggestions — cut developer turnaround time by 30%.
Designed end-to-end automation frameworks simulating real-world customer workflows across container vulnerability scanning, agentless security, and compliance workloads (Python, Playwright, Pytest).
Validated product behaviour across AWS, Azure, GCP, IBM Cloud, and Oracle Cloud using Terraform-provisioned, Ansible-configured multi-cloud test environments.
Embedded quality gates into deployment pipelines — enabling release-anytime deployments with high confidence across every build.
Delivered compliance automation covering CIS, SOC 2, HIPAA, NIST, PCI DSS, and ISO standards for AWS, Azure, and GCP — built as distributed modules that integrate directly with each cloud provider.
Built data-driven automation to generate traffic across Linux hosts and Kubernetes clusters (ECS, Fargate, EKS) for realistic load and security testing.
Created UI regression and smoke test suites with Selenium and Pytest, integrated into post-merge pipelines executing on every cloud deployment.
Led the design and implementation of 90% of shared Kubernetes testing libraries — covering Docker deployments, database validation, and UI data verification.
Mentored junior QA engineers on test design, automation architecture, and implementation best practices.
Built an AssertJ-based automation framework for a Java/Swing IoT application (Shooting Detectors), covering functional and regression test scenarios.
Developed shell scripts for end-to-end system testing, integrated with the AssertJ framework for full pipeline coverage.
Tracked and triaged defects in Jira, collaborated with developers to validate fixes, and maintained test suites in sync with evolving requirements under weekly Agile sprints.
